steps: Log in to your Sentry account or sign up at https://sentry.io/signup/
Enter a descriptive name for the token
Copy the token immediately — it is shown only once

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: Auth Token
credential_fields.description: Your Sentry user auth token or organization auth token. Sent as a Bearer token in the Authorization header.

notes: Free Developer plan available with 1 user, 14-day data retention
Auth tokens are scoped — select only the permissions your integration needs
Token is shown only once at creation time — copy it before leaving the page
Organization-level tokens (for CI/CD) are found at Settings > Developer Settings > Organization Tokens
Personal tokens are tied to your account; prefer organization tokens for automation
The Sentry API base URL is https://sentry.io/api/0/

test_endpoint.description: List organizations the token has access to, to verify authentication
